rationale: Educ. Code §37.018 requires school districts to provide educators copies of the subchapter and local discipline policy. It bears no relation to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal values under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Each school district shall provide each teacher and administrator with a copy of this subchapter and with a copy of the local policy relating to this subchapter.
_note: Rule text concerns educator information distribution only; no nexus to homestead exemption valuation.
